tasks.subject: Task 1: Parse temporal params + TemporalFilter helper + RenderParams
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the genome's temporal_samples / temporal_filter_type / temporal_filter_width first-class (parsed, modeled, round-tripped) + TemporalFilter.samples(_:type:width:) helper (port of flam3 flam3_create_temporal_filter, rect.c:645).

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameKit/Genome.swift (Quality ~111), Flam3Parser.swift (makeFlame ~140), Flam3Serializer.swift (~30), RenderTypes.swift (RenderParams:20). Create Sources/FlameReference/TemporalFilter.swift, Tests/FlameReferenceTests/TemporalFilterTests.swift. Extend Tests/FlameKitTests/RealGenomePaletteTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** temporal_samples=1000/box/1.2 parses correctly; TemporalFilter.samples box weights sum 1 + deltas span width; serializer round-trips; RenderParams.temporalSamples default 1.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalFilterTests --filter RealGenomePaletteTests --filter SerializerTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameKit/Genome.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/Flam3Parser.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/Flam3Serializer.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/RenderTypes.swift", "Sources/FlameReference/TemporalFilter.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalFilterTests --filter RealGenomePaletteTests --filter SerializerTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["temporal params parse", "TemporalFilter box correct", "serializer round-trips", "RenderParams.temporalSamples default 1"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CPU temporal motion blur (density accumulation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ReferenceRenderer renders a motion-blurred frame by accumulating N reduced-sample chaos histograms (one per sub-time) into one histogram, then DE + tone-map once — cost-neutral (rect.c:833).

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameReference/ReferenceRenderer.swift (add render(blendAt:centerTime:temporal:params:)), Sources/FlameKit/RenderTypes.swift (Histogram scale(by:) + accumulate(_:); RenderParams.samplesPerPixel -> var). Create Tests/FlameReferenceTests/TemporalBlurTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** temporalSamples=1 byte-identical to plain render; constant blendAt preserves total light (mean within 5%); test-fast green.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalBlurTests && make test-fast

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameReference/ReferenceRenderer.swift", "Sources/FlameKit/RenderTypes.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalBlurTests && make test-fast", "acceptanceCriteria": ["temporalSamples=1 == plain", "static preserves light", "test-fast green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Metal temporal motion blur (N fused chaos passes)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MetalRenderer renders a motion-blurred frame by encoding N fused chaos passes (one per sub-time genome, threadCount/N threads) into the SAME atomicBuf, then a single decode->DE->log->display. Cost-neutral; box filter.

**Files:** Modify Sources/FlameRenderer/MetalRenderer.swift (add render(blendAt:), modeled on renderFused). Create Tests/FlameRendererTests/TemporalBlurMetalTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** Metal temporalSamples=1 == plain Metal render; FusedUnfusedParityTests still passes; --temporal-samples 8 renders non-black.

**Verify:** swift test --filter TemporalBlurMetalTests --filter FusedUnfusedParityTests (sandbox OFF)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/FlameRenderer/MetalRenderer.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TemporalBlurMetalTests --filter FusedUnfusedParityTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Metal temporalSamples=1 == plain", "FusedUnfusedParity passes", "temporal-samples 8 non-black"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: --temporal-samples in animate + production validation (USER GATE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriterion is re-validated independently with captured output.

**Goal:** Wire motion blur into emberweft animate (--temporal-samples N), re-render a real-genome clip at production settings, visually verify the transition->loop jump is gone, motion is relaxing, comparable to official videos.

**Files:** Modify Sources/EmberweftCLI/AnimateCommand.swift (render loop ~182-237).

**Acceptance Criteria:** --temporal-samples parses (default genome value, cap 64); blendAt closure + temporal render path; clip rendered (2 sheep 05739->31943, --frames 160 --segments 3 --loop-cycles 1 --temporal-samples 32 --quality 500 --size 1280x720 --backend metal) muxed to /tmp/m3_mb.mp4; boundary PSNR (319->320) within ~2dB of within-loop (100->101) — jump gone; user visual: smooth/relaxing + matches /tmp/es_official/ official videos.

**Verify:** render + ffmpeg mux + boundary PSNR; open /tmp/m3_mb.mp4 + official videos.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/EmberweftCLI/AnimateCommand.swift"], "verifyCommand": "render + boundary PSNR + open", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flag parses", "blendAt + temporal path", "clip to /tmp/m3_mb.mp4", "boundary PSNR within 2dB (jump gone)", "user visual smooth + matches official"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["boundary-psnr"], ["within-loop-psnr"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Density-gap diagnostic (localize the ≈20 dB)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Localize WHERE Emberweft's density distribution diverges from flam3 on a real genome (~20 dB PSNR), giving Task 6 a concrete target. Hypothesis: Emberweft chaos histogram is peakier.

**Files:** Create Tools/density_diff.py, Tools/density_diff.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:** density_diff.py renders 00256 (no blur, matched: 800x592, oversample=1, estimator_radius=0, same seed) in both Emberweft CPU + flam3 (temporal_samples=1), prints brightness histogram (>=8 buckets), % above {4,32,128}, centroid + active bbox; density_diff.md states divergent region + ranked causes (chaos distribution / DE curve / k2-sampleDensity / spatial filter).

**Verify:** python3 Tools/density_diff.py prints both distributions; .md documents localization.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tools/density_diff.py", "Tools/density_diff.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 Tools/density_diff.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders both + prints histogram/thresholds/centroid/bbox", "md localizes region + ranks causes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Fix density gap + gated real-genome vs-flam3 parity test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close the localized density difference so real-genome PSNR vs flam3 reaches >=38 dB, locked by a gated parity test.

**Files:** Modify whatever Task 5 localized (likely ChaosGame.swift / DensityEstimation.swift / ToneMapping.swift). Create Tests/FlameReferenceTests/RealGenomeParityTests.swift.

**Acceptance Criteria:** RealGenomeParityTests renders each Tests/Goldens/genomes_real/ fixture (CPU, no blur, matched params) vs live flam3-render, asserts PSNR>=38 dB + SSIM>=0.95 (XCTSkip if oracle absent); red before (~20 dB) / green after; GoldenParity still >=30 dB; test-fast green.

**Verify:** swift test --filter RealGenomeParityTests (>=38 dB) && swift test --filter GoldenParityTests (unchanged).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Tests/FlameReferenceTests/RealGenomeParityTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter RealGenomeParityTests && swift test --filter GoldenParityTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RealGenomeParity >=38dB/0.95SSIM", "red before green after", "GoldenParity >=30dB, test-fast green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
